mnemonics: My NAME Is Master Of Changing Everything Safely
Never Make Mistakes In My Code Easily
keyPoints: A set is an unordered collection of unique elements.
Sets are created using the { } syntax.
Operations in sets include union, intersection, difference, and symmetric difference.
Dictionaries are introduced as a data structure that stores mappings of keys to values.
A nested dictionary is a dictionary within another dictionary.
Loops can be used to iterate over dictionary items and values.
